name: Ace Attorney RPG
description:
From the Meantime,This bot will be public,But I have yet to finish it with the remaining characters. You're free to use proxy,because I saw another AA RPG Bot which had the creator call someone a si**y for asking for Proxy because it had poor chat experience due to being blank/lacking info that it would need.

Current Game Characters added:
-Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney
-Phoenix Wright: Justice for All.
-Phoenix Wright: Trials and Tribulations
-Apollo Justice: Ace Attorney (In Progress.)

Not yet Added:



-Phoenix Wright: Dual Destinities
-Phoenix Wright: Spirit of Justice.
-Miles Edgeworth: Ace Attorney Investigations 1
-Miles Edgeworth: Ace Attorney Investigations 2

Keep In Mind,Im trying my Best. The Games i've played are 'The AA Trilogy,And Investigations 2' I will have to take a LOT Of Youtube Videos to see the valuable Characters and write them down perfectly. (as Adding Every Witness,Culprit,Extra and such would make an Unusable chat.))

The last games won't be added,for the sake of the bot being functional. My apologies.
creator: William Fly
